THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE LEAD CASE IS 555176 AND ALL FURTHER PAPERS FOR BOTH CASES ARE TO BE FILED IN THE LEAD CASE ONLY. THE JUNE 7, 2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET IN BOTH CASES REMAINS AND WILL NOW BE FOR THE CONSOLIDATED CASES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-555176 WITH CASE CGC-16-555267
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KENYON M. YOUNG OF HE LAW OFFICES OF KULUVA, ARMIJO & GARCIA, TEL. NO. 1-415-273-6503 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Anne L'Heureux and Matthew L'Heureux's motion to consolidate this case with case 555176 is granted. No opposition filed. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. The lead case is 555176 and all further papers for both cases are to be filed in the lead case only. The June 7, 2017 case management conference set in both cases remains and will now be for the consolidated cases.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
